Our Sectors

Sector depth aligned to Somalia's priorities

Sectoral Expertise for Somalia's Development

We deliver specialized advisory and implementation support across sectors central to Somalia's human capital development, employment generation, and productive livelihoods. Our focus reflects national priorities as outlined in the National Transformation Plan and the operational requirements of development partner programs.

Labor Markets Employment Social Protection TVET Youth

Labor, Employment & Social Protection

SOMVISCON supports integrated labor, employment, social protection, and digital service delivery systems. We work to expand decent work opportunities, strengthen social inclusion, and improve access to services for vulnerable populations including youth, women, internally displaced persons, returnees, and persons with disabilities.

  • Labor market assessments and employment diagnostics
  • Jobs and skills program design and implementation
  • Technical and vocational education and training (TVET) strategies
  • Youth employment and apprenticeship programs
  • Entrepreneurship programs and occupational standards
  • Workforce planning and skills matching systems
  • Design and strengthening of inclusive social protection systems

Livestock, Veterinary Services & One Health

SOMVISCON brings cross-sectoral expertise to support Somalia's livestock economy, one of the country's largest sources of employment, exports, and household income. Our work aligns with labor, livelihoods, and public health objectives.

  • Institutional and policy support for veterinary and animal health services
  • Capacity building for veterinary officers and paraprofessionals
  • Advisory on livestock-based livelihoods and employment programs
  • Disease surveillance, reporting systems, and field operations
  • Integration of livestock health into One Health and social resilience frameworks
  • Support to donor-funded livestock and veterinary programs
Livestock Veterinary One Health Livelihoods
Governance Public Sector Reform Accountability

Governance & Public Sector Reform

SOMVISCON supports ministries and public institutions to strengthen governance systems, improve service delivery, and meet fiduciary and accountability standards required by development partners.

  • Institutional capacity assessments and reform roadmaps
  • Policy and regulatory development
  • Results-based management and performance systems
  • Public sector coordination and inter-ministerial alignment
  • Fiduciary and accountability standards implementation

Development Programs & Donor Support

We provide end-to-end project support aligned with operational policies and result frameworks. This covers project design, implementation, monitoring, evaluation, learning, and compliance advisory.

  • Project design and implementation support
  • MEL system development and management
  • Results frameworks, indicators, and reporting
  • Donor compliance and fiduciary advisory
  • Safeguards and risk management
Development Donor Programs MEL Compliance

Looking for sector-specific expertise?

Our teams bring deep sectoral knowledge to every engagement.
